nameEn: LI JU 路 Table Tennis Legend
name: Li Ju

timeline.subtitle: Sydney Olympics
achievements: 馃 Sydney Olympics Women's Doubles Champion (with Wang Nan)
馃 Sydney Olympics Women's Singles Runner-up

achievements.title: 猸?Olympic Champion
achievements.description: Li Ju was known for her right-hand shakehand fast attack combined with loop play. She won the Sydney Olympic women's doubles gold partnering Wang Nan.
